title: Harris Essentials Paint Brush | for Walls & Ceilings | 2" Grey
features: 2in paint brush for use with emulsion paints
Ideal for cutting in around plug sockets, light switches and skirting boards
The soft synthetic filament paint brush head retains water based paint, giving a good even flow as you paint, to give a good paint finish
Comfortable easy grip handle, ideal for those long decorating sessions
Easily cleaned by running the brush under the tap after you've finished painting
description: From the manufacturer Choosing The Right Harris Product For Your Decorating Task Has Never Been Easier At Harris, our mission is to share our knowledge to give you the confidence you need to succeed in your decorating and painting projects. That means listening, learning, creating, improving and innovating our painting and decorating tools to make your product choice easier and more enjoyable. We've specially developed our new painting and decorating product range for DIY decorators. The success of Harris products has always been down to how we continually develop our painting and decorating tools to meet your needs, so we’ve grouped, and colour coded our products by traditional DIY tasks. Our customers are always at the heart of everything we do! Harris Essentials Walls & Ceilings Paint Brush 2in Contains 1 x Harris Essentials Walls & Ceilings Paint Brush 2in After care After painting with water based paints, such as emulsion, first remove the excess paint. Then wash in warm soapy water ensuring all paint is removed. Finally allow to dry naturally with the brush head flat. For use on interior flat walls and ceilings Ideal for general painting with emulsion paints. For use with emulsion paints. For use on walls and ceilings Suggested use For use on interior flat walls and ceilings. For best results, rinse brush head before use to remove any dust. Three Quality Levels to Choose From Harris Essentials Painting & Decorating Tools Range The Essentials range is a straightforward selection of basic yet reliable decorating and painting tools, that help you get those painting jobs done in a quick & easy way. Offers excellent value for money and gives you all the decorating and painting tools you need when on a budget. Harris Seriously Good Painting & Decorating Tools Range Seriously Good is our mid-range of decorating and painting tools, offering quality paint brushes, paint rollers and decorating and painting tools that perform well without too much effort. Harris Ultimate Painting & Decorating Tools Range Superior in quality, look and feel, the Ultimate range is our best decorating and painting tools range. It combines innovative materials so the paint brushes and paint rollers give an excellent paint finish whilst making your decorating task easier
